narrative.intro: Your old friend is up to something big, and it's time to teach his people a little lesson. You've found out where his organization is storing contraband for sale off-world, and you've decided to pay them a visit.
narrative.briefing: Set up the battlefield resembling a camp, factory compound, or similar. Scatter the opposition fairly evenly around the battlefield. Select which edge to enter from. Roll to Seize the Initiative (at +2 if you Won Event 2, +3 if you captured a mercenary).
narrative.completion_win: You Win by either Holding the Field or planting a sabotage device at the center. You may claim an additional Loot roll from snooping around the site.

deployment.crew_setup: select battlefield edge, enter from chosen edge

composition.ai_rules: Within 12" of crew: Defensive AI. Not within 12": move to center, then Defensive AI.

primary.description: Win by either Holding the Field, or planting a sabotage device at center

alternative_win.description: Drive off every opponent, then plant device at leisure

win.description: Additional Loot roll from snooping around the site
